{{Quote|THE COMFORT YOU DESERVE|Elegaic Fabrications slogan|<ref name="Rebel Stand" />}}
'''Elegaic Fabrications''' was a furniture manufacturing company with a plant on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. They were known for very expensive and functional furnishings, including chairs that converted into beds, chairs that carried their owners in the air, and furniture that massaged those who used them.<ref name="Rebel Stand" />

{{Company-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''
